section.title: 8.1 Description
section.p: Chunk embeddings are stored in a FAISS vector index to support efficient similarity search.
The vector index stores embeddings for each chunk and enables nearest-neighbor retrieval based on query embeddings.

section.title: 8.2 Index Structure
section.p: When a query is executed, the retrieval engine returns the identifiers of the most similar chunks.
These identifiers are then used to retrieve the full chunk objects from the corpus data.
